architecture_fit.note: Smallest possible delta: one self-attention head, no MLP, d_model=5, hand-wired CLS pooling + quadratic readout solves XOR at 1.0 acc.

baseline_comparison.note: Two strawmen (zeroed attention, linear readout) both collapse to/below the linear-probe floor, while the full circuit beats it everywhere.

faithfulness.note: Hand-built circuit with explicit ablations knocking out each load-bearing piece (attention routing and quadratic step), each shown to break the behaviour.

operating_range.note: Accuracy = 1.0 across the entire marginal sweep p=0.1..0.9, beating the linear floor at every slice.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entire mechanism is hand-set embeddings + identity Q/K/V + fixed quadratic readout — a fully written-out circuit, the strongest form of this item.

visual_judgement.note: 4-corner truth table side-by-side with both ablation columns makes the XOR claim and the load-bearing pieces immediately legible.

visualisation_rationale.note: README clearly ties the truth-table + ablation panels to the causal claim the goal cares about, with the right baseline contrast.

notes: Exemplary hand-built interpretability attempt: a single attention head with no MLP and a quadratic readout achieves perfect XOR (xor_robustness=1.0) across the full marginal sweep, beating the best-linear-probe floor everywhere. Faithfulness is demonstrated via two clean ablations that each knock out a load-bearing component and collapse to/below the floor. Minor doc nit (README says d_model=4, code uses 5) does not affect the result; all rubric items are fully satisfied.
